title: stelis haltonii
intro: Stelis haltonii, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Stelis haltonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
